Petition For Instructions: Appiontment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diedre Von Rock and Alexandra Coleman, via Zoom, for Saffa C. Bardaro, Petitioner; John Vaught, via Zoom, for and with Timothy J. Wanek, Guardian ad Litem.

The court and Ms. Von Rock discuss the decedent's intent with the 1995 and 2015 Trusts. Ms. Von Rock offers testimony regarding her belief regarding the decedent's plans to nominate her client. Mr. Vaught advises that he has no objections to the appointment of the petitioner as Successor Trustee. The court points to the bond issue and advises that the settlor intended that a bond be required. Ms. Von Rock offers advocacy for bond to be waived. Mr. Vaught has no objection to the bond being waived.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
